refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns the fractional location of the closest point on a line to a point.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns a float between 0 and 1 representing the location of the closest point on a LineString to the given Point, as a fraction of 2d line length.
You can use the returned location to extract a Point () or a substring ().
This is useful for approximating numbers of addresses
Changed: 2.1.0. Up to 2.0.x this was called ST_Line_Locate_Point.

refsection.title: Examples
